summary.description: FlashIt guided reuse mapping documenting consumption of hardened assets from PHR and Digital Marketing (DMOS)
summary.recommendation: FlashIt is in candidate status; reuse PHR/DMOS assets through YAPPC guided reuse when moving to shaping phase
summary.blockReason: FlashIt is not yet release-ready (mobile lifecycle disabled, web lifecycle in validation)

phrAssetConsumption.description: PHR assets recommended for FlashIt when healthcare-adjacent features are needed

assets.applicability: High - FlashIt handles user content; consent patterns from PHR are relevant
adaptationRequired: Replace PHI-specific language with content-ownership language
Adapt UI for marketing content context

assets.applicability: Medium - FlashIt needs audit for content operations
adaptationRequired: Generalize from healthcare audit to content operations audit

dmosAssetConsumption.description: Digital Marketing (DMOS) assets highly applicable to FlashIt marketing content workflows

assets.applicability: High - FlashIt content approval workflows can leverage DMOS patterns
adaptationRequired: Adapt from campaign approval to content preview approval

assets.applicability: High - FlashIt external integrations can use connector patterns
adaptationRequired: Add preview-specific connectors (social media, messaging platforms)

assets.applicability: Medium - FlashIt content analytics dashboard can leverage patterns
adaptationRequired: Replace campaign metrics with content engagement metrics

blockers: FlashIt web lifecycle is not yet validated in staging
FlashIt has not completed foundation usage profile validation

nextSteps.step: Evaluate PHR consent patterns for FlashIt content ownership

yappcIntegration.blockMessage: FlashIt is a candidate product not yet ready for guided asset reuse. Complete web lifecycle validation first.
